title: Allogene Therapeutics Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2024 Financial Results and Business Update
text: ALLO Q4 2024 Financial Results. Cash: $373.1M in cash/equivalents/investments. Net loss Q4: $59.9M ($0.28/share). Full-year 2024: $257.6M loss ($1.32/share). Operating expenses Q4: $60.5M ($45M R&D, $15.5M G&A). Full-year: $273.2M. Runway projection: 2H 2026. 2025 cash consumption: ~$170M. Cema-Cel (ALPHA3): 40 sites activated, ~240 patients enrolling. Lymphodepletion selection and futility analysis mid-2025. Primary efficacy data end 2026. BLA submission 2027. ALLO-329 Autoimmune: FDA cleared IND. RESOLUTION trial initiate mid-2025. PoC data year-end 2025. ALLO-316 Renal Cell: Phase 1b expansion complete. Positive Phase 1 data. Phase 1b data mid-2025.
